name: HRA_PF_DEFNS_B
description: This table stores the Process Flow Definitions of the performance management

columns.Name: PROCESS_FLOW_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Id for the Process Flow definition set by the system

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: Defines the date from which the process flow definition is valid

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: Defines the date till when the process flow definition is valid

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Status code for the process flow definition defines if it is active or inactive

columns.Name: WKR_PERF_DOC_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating worker can generate performance document

columns.Name: MGR_PERF_DOC_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating manager can generate performance document

columns.Name: CONFIRM_CRITERIA_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to include step for setting of evaluation criteria

columns.Name: MGR_SET_EVAL_CRTRIA_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating manager can set evaluation criteria

columns.Name: WKR_SET_EVAL_CRTRIA_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating worker can set evaluation criteria

columns.Name: MGR_CMPLT_EVAL_CRTRIA_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating manager can complete evaluation criteria

columns.Name: WKR_CMPLT_EVAL_CRTRIA_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating worker can complete evaluation criteria

columns.Name: PRELIMINARY_RATINGS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to include step for entering preliminary ratings

columns.Name: ASSIGN_PARTICIPANTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to include steps for assignment of participants

columns.Name: MGR_SELECT_PCPNS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether manager can select participants

columns.Name: WRK_SELECT_PCPNS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the worker can select participants

columns.Name: MGR_TRACK_PCPNS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the manager can track participants

columns.Name: WRK_TRACK_PCPNS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the worker can track participants

columns.Name: WRK_VIEW_SUB_FDBCK_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the worker can view feedback when it is submitted even before manager evaluation is completed.

columns.Name: WRK_REQUEST_PCPNS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the worker can send a request to the participants

columns.Name: MGR_ADD_QUESTION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether manager can add questions to the participants.

columns.Name: WRK_ADD_QUESTION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether worker can add question for the participants.

columns.Name: MGR_ASSGN_PRTCPNT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating manager can assign participants

columns.Name: WKR_ASSGN_PRTCPNT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating worker can assign participants

columns.Name: PARTICIPANT_EVAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to include steps for participant evaluations of the worker

columns.Name: MGR_CMPLT_ASSGNMNT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating manager can complete assignment cycle

columns.Name: WKR_CMPLT_ASSGNMNT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating worker can complete assignment cycle

columns.Name: WKR_SELF_EVAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating worker performs self-evaluation

columns.Name: MGR_EVAL_OF_WRKR_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating manager performs evaluation of worker

columns.Name: EVAL_TASKS_CONCURRENT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating whether worker self evaluation task and manager evaluation of worker task are concurrent.

columns.Name: DISABLE_RESUBMIT_MGR_EVAL
columns.Comments: Do not allow additional edit of manager evaluation task when completed

columns.Name: FIRST_APPROVAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to Include approval processing step

columns.Name: FIRST_APPROVAL_ID
columns.Comments: First approval Id

columns.Name: SECOND_APPROVAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to include second approval processing step

columns.Name: SECOND_APPROVAL_ID
columns.Comments: Second approval Id

columns.Name: AUTO_SUBMIT_APPROVAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to configure automatic submission of approval tasks

columns.Name: SHARE_PERFORMANCE_DOC_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to Include document sharing step

columns.Name: WKR_ACK_DOC_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating worker must acknowledge document

columns.Name: CONDUCT_MEETINGS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to Include review meeting step

columns.Name: WKR_ACK_REVIEW_MTG_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating worker must acknowledge review meeting

columns.Name: FINAL_FEEDBACK_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to Include worker and/or manager final feedback step

columns.Name: WKR_FINAL_FEEDBCK_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating Worker can provide feedback on overall rating

columns.Name: MGR_FINAL_FEEDBACK_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating manager can provide feedback on worker's final feedback

columns.Name: NEXT_PERIOD_GOALS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to include step to set next period goals

columns.Name: ALLOCATE_REWARDS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to include step to allocate rewards

columns.Name: MANAGE_PROMOTIONS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to include step to manage promotions

columns.Name: ALLOW_SHARE_LOCK_FOR_CALIB
columns.Comments: Indicates that sharing task can be locked for calibration in process flow.

columns.Name: MGR_REOPEN_PCPN_FDBCK_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether manager can reopen participant feedback.

columns.Name: WRK_REOPEN_PCPN_FDBCK_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether worker can reopen participant feedback.

columns.Name: PCPN_REOPEN_FDBCK_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether participant can reopen feedback.

columns.Name: CALENDAR_INVITE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to enable calendar meeting invite.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.
